title: From Pharmacist to Placement Professional: A Career Comeback Story in Inclusive Employment
author and read time: Lavanya | Placement Coordinator, WinVinaya Foundation | 5 min read
summary: Added a personal narrative detailing the journey of transitioning from a pharmacist to a placement coordinator at WinVinaya Foundation, emphasizing the importance of inclusive employment for persons with disabilities.
